{{Infobox character
|name=Alice
|status=<span class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed" data-expandtext="Spoiler — reveal" data-collapsetext="Hide">Alive</span>
|species=Human
|residence=Victorian England
|first_seen=Chapter 1
}}

== Biography ==
'''Alice''' is a curious seven-year-old girl who falls down a rabbit hole into [[Wonderland]], a nonsensical world she explores across the story. She follows the [[White Rabbit]], meets the [[Cheshire Cat]], and clashes with the [[Queen of Hearts]].

== Appearance ==
Alice wears a blue pinafore dress. Her size changes constantly — she grows ''enormous'' after a cake and shrinks after a drink.

<div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed" data-expandtext="Chapter 12 — reveal" data-collapsetext="Hide">
== Narrative role ==
By the trial, Alice realises the court is ''nothing but a pack of cards'' and wakes — the dream ends. A stray note about the [[Dormouse]] belongs here too.

</div>


[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Main Characters]]
[[Category:Characters (Book 1)]]
